/* ==========================================================================
   1. Root Variables & Reset
   ========================================================================== */
:root {
  --background: 0 0% 100%;
  --foreground: 222.2 84% 4.9%;
  --card: 0 0% 100%;
  --card-foreground: 222.2 84% 4.9%;
  --primary: 252 77% 60%;
  --primary-foreground: 210 40% 98%;
  --secondary: 252 77% 37%;
  --secondary-foreground: 210 40% 98%;
  --muted: 210 40% 96.1%;
  --muted-foreground: 215.4 16.3% 46.9%;
  --border: 214.3 31.8% 91.4%;
  --radius: 0.5rem;
}

* {
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

body {
  font-family: "Inter", system-ui, sans-serif;
  line-height: 1.5;
  font-weight: 400;
  color: hsl(var(--foreground));
  background-color: hsl(var(--background));
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
  -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
}

/* ==========================================================================
   2. Layout Containers
   ========================================================================== */
.container {
  max-width: 1280px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 0 1rem;
}

@media (min-width: 640px) {
  .container {
    padding: 0 1.5rem;
  }
}

@media (min-width: 1024px) {
  .container {
    padding: 0 2rem;
  }
}

@media (min-width: 768px) {
  .section-title {
    font-size: 2.25rem;
  }
}

/* ==========================================================================
   3. Legacy / WordPress Theme Overrides
   ========================================================================== */
#block-70 {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.hero-ab {
  position: relative;
}

.hero-left-con {
  position: absolute;
  top: -140px;
  left: -40px;
}

.hero-right-con {
  position: absolute;
  top: -140px;
  right: -40px;
}

.cust-highlight .gradient-highlight {
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #5E40E8 1.34%, #B795EA 100%);
  -webkit-background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
}

.grd-h {
  background: linear-gradient(to right, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.24) -63%, #e8f7f9 66%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0) 145%);
  -webkit-background-clip: text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
}

.list-border .wp-block-kadence-listitem {
  border-bottom: 1px solid #DBDBDB;
  padding-bottom: 10px !important;
}

.list-border2 .wp-block-kadence-listitem {
  border-bottom: 1px solid #AF99FF;
  padding-bottom: 10px !important;
}

/* ==========================================================================
   4. Interactive Benefits Section (Tabs Component)
   ========================================================================== */
.benefits-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: 3rem;
  align-items: start;
}

@media (min-width: 768px) {
  .benefits-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 2fr;
  }
}

.benefits-tabs {
  display: flex !important;
  flex-direction: column !important;
  gap: 0.5rem !important;
}

.tab-button {
  width: 100% !important;
  text-align: left !important;
  padding: 1rem !important;
  border-radius: 0.5rem !important;
  transition: all 0.5s !important;
  position: relative !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
  border: none !important;
  cursor: pointer !important;
  background: #ffffff !important;
  color: #111827 !important;
}

.tab-button:hover {
  background-color: #f3f4f6 !important;
}

.tab-button.active {
  background-color: #6b5ce7 !important;
  color: #ffffff !important;
  box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) !important;
}

.tab-content {
  display: flex !important;
  align-items: center !important;
  justify-content: space-between !important;
}

.tab-title {
  font-weight: 600 !important;
}

.chevron {
  width: 1.25rem !important;
  height: 1.25rem !important;
  transition: transform 0.3s !important;
}

.tab-button.active .chevron {
  transform: none !important;
}

.tab-button:not(.active) .chevron {
  transform: translateX(-0.25rem) !important;
}

.progress-bar {
  position: absolute !important;
  bottom: 0 !important;
  left: 0 !important;
  height: 0.25rem !important;
  background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3) !important;
  width: 0% !important;
  transition: width 3s linear !important;
}

.tab-button.active .progress-bar {
  width: 100% !important;
}

.content-card {
  border-radius: 0.75rem;
  border: 2px solid rgba(124, 58, 237, 0.2);
  background-color: hsl(var(--card));
  color: hsl(var(--card-foreground));
  box-shadow: 0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25);
  transition: all 0.3s;
  height: 100%;
}

.card-header {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 1rem;
  padding: 1.5rem;
  padding-bottom: 1rem;
}

.icon-container {
  background-color: rgba(124, 58, 237, 0.1);
  padding: 0.75rem;
  border-radius: 0.5rem;
}

.icon {
  width: 2rem;
  height: 2rem;
  color: hsl(var(--primary));
}

.card-title {
  padding-top: 8px;
  font-size: 1.5rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
  color: #111827;
}

.card-content {
  padding: 1.5rem;
  padding-top: 0;
}

.card-description {
  color: #374151;
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.625;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}

.image-container {
  margin-top: 1rem;
  border-radius: 0.5rem;
  overflow: hidden;
  background:
    radial-gradient(at 40% 20%, #ffb87a 0, transparent 50%),
    radial-gradient(at 80% 0, #1fddff 0, transparent 50%),
    radial-gradient(at 0 50%, #ffdbde 0, transparent 50%),
    radial-gradient(at 80% 50%, #ff85ad 0, transparent 50%),
    radial-gradient(at 0 100%, #ffb58a 0, transparent 50%),
    radial-gradient(at 80% 100%, #6b66ff 0, transparent 50%),
    radial-gradient(at 0 0, #ff85a7 0, transparent 50%);
}

.benefit-image {
  width: 100%;
  height: auto;
  object-fit: cover;
}

/* ==========================================================================
   5. LinkBoss Product Core Layout (Modified Grid System)
   ========================================================================== */
.lb-features-section {
  padding: 6rem 0;
  background-color: #f1efff; 
  font-family: "Inter", system-ui, sans-serif;
  color: #1e293b;
}

.lb-container {
  max-width: 72rem; 
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 0 1.5rem;
}

/* Header Typography */
.lb-header-wrap {
  text-align: center;
  margin-bottom: 4rem;
}

.lb-title {
  font-size: 1.875rem; 
  font-weight: 800;
  color: #1e1b4b; 
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.1;
  letter-spacing: -0.025em;
}

.lb-subtitle {
  font-size: 1.25rem;
  color: #64748b;
  font-weight: 500;
}

.lb-subtitle strong {
  color: #1e1b4b;
  font-weight: 700;
}

@media (min-width: 768px) {
  .lb-title {
    font-size: 3rem; 
  }
}

/* Base Main Feature Layout Grid */
.lb-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: 1.5rem;
  align-items: stretch;
}

@media (min-width: 768px) {
  .lb-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1.2fr 2fr; /* Controls the column track ratios */
    align-items: start;
  }
}

/* Sub-grid wrapping the Right Column Cards */
.lb-right-column {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: 1.5rem;
}

/* Base Component Styling for Content Cards */
.lb-card {
  background-color: #ffffff;
  border-radius: 1.5rem;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 20px -2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); 
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}

.lb-card:hover {
  box-shadow: 0 10px 30px -5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); 
  transform: translateY(-4px);
}

.lb-card-padding {
  padding: 1.5rem; /* Reduced from 2rem to save vertical space */
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
  height: 100%;
}

/* Product Component Badges & Icons */
.lb-icon-box {
  width: 4rem;
  height: 4rem;
  border-radius: 1rem;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem; /* Reduced from 1.5rem to fix the gap */
  transition: transform 0.3s ease;
}

.lb-card:hover .lb-icon-box {
  transform: scale(1.1);
}

.lb-icon-svg {
  width: 2rem;
  height: 2rem;
}

.lb-icon-purple { background-color: #f3e8ff; color: #8b5cf6; }
.lb-icon-blue   { background-color: #dbeafe; color: #3b82f6; }
.lb-icon-green  { background-color: #d1fae5; color: #10b981; }

.lb-card-title {
  font-size: 1.5rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1e1b4b;
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
  line-height: 1.3;
}

.lb-card-desc {
  color: #475569;
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.625;
}

/* ==========================================================================
   5A. Fixes for Left Column (9:16 Video Component) & Site Structure Card
   ========================================================================== */
.lb-video-short {
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 380px;      /* Prevents aspect skew on wide layouts */
  aspect-ratio: 9 / 16;  /* Strictly forces structural format proportions */
  border-radius: 1.5rem;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: #000;
  justify-self: center;  /* Centers frame within layout grid tracks */
  align-self: center;    /* Keeps layout vertically balanced alongside right cards */
}

.lb-video-link {
  display: block;
  position: relative;
  text-decoration: none;
  height: 100%;
}

.lb-video-link img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
  display: block;
  transition: filter 0.3s ease;
}

.lb-play-btn {
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  width: 68px;
  height: 68px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.45);
  backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
  border: 2px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
  pointer-events: none;
}

.lb-play-btn svg {
  width: 28px;
  height: 28px;
  fill: white;
  margin-left: 3px;
  filter: drop-shadow(0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.2));
}

.lb-video-link:hover .lb-play-btn {
  background: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.7);
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.1);
}

.lb-video-link:hover img {
  filter: brightness(0.85);
}

/* Site Structure Mock Window Decorator styling */
.lb-viz-header {
  height: 2.5rem;
  background-color: #f1f5f9;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 0 1rem;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.lb-dot { width: 0.75rem; height: 0.75rem; border-radius: 50%; }
.lb-dot-red    { background-color: #f87171; }
.lb-dot-yellow { background-color: #facc15; }
.lb-dot-green  { background-color: #4ade80; }

.lb-viz-label {
  margin-left: auto;
  font-size: 10px;
  color: #94a3b8;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  font-family: monospace;
}

/* Site Structure Cropping Adjustments */
.lb-card.lb-viz-card {
  height: 340px; /* Reduced fixed height container */
  min-height: unset;
}

.lb-viz-body {
  background: #fff;
  position: relative;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  overflow: hidden;
  height: calc(100% - 2.5rem); /* Ensures body fills card minus header */
}

.lb-viz-img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;       /* Centers data node visualizations */
  object-position: center; /* Masks outer edges seamlessly */
}

/* Pipeline Flow Details & Step Badges */
.lb-exclusive-badge {
  position: absolute;
  top: 1.5rem;
  right: 1.5rem;
  background-color: #eff6ff;
  color: #2563eb;
  font-size: 10px;
  font-weight: 700;
  padding: 0.375rem 0.75rem;
  border-radius: 0.5rem;
  border: 1px solid #dbeafe;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .pipeline-flow {
    flex-direction: column !important;
    align-items: center !important;
    gap: 12px !important;
    overflow-x: visible !important;
    padding-bottom: 0 !important;
  }
  .pipeline-flow > div {
    width: 100% !important;
    max-width: 280px !important;
    min-width: 0 !important;
  }
  .pipeline-flow .pipeline-arrow {
    transform: rotate(90deg) !important;
  }
}

/* Bottom Grid Twin Feature Row Configuration */
.lb-grid-bottom {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: 1.5rem;
  margin-top: 1.5rem;
}

@media (min-width: 768px) {
  .lb-grid-bottom {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  }
}

/* ==========================================================================
   6. Custom Interactive Silo Component Showcase
   ========================================================================== */
.silo-slider-container {
  max-width: 1200px;
  width: 100%;
}

.silo-slider {
  position: relative;
  max-width: 100%;
  overflow: hidden;
  border-radius: 24px;
}

.silo-track {
  display: flex;
  transition: transform 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
  width: 400%;
}

.silo-card {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9);
  backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
  border: 1px solid rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.2);
  border-radius: 24px;
  overflow: hidden;
  position: relative;
  width: 25%;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  display: flex;
  min-height: 400px;
}

.silo-card::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  height: 3px;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--accent-color), transparent);
}

.silo-card:nth-child(1) { --accent-color: #3b82f6; }
.silo-card:nth-child(2) { --accent-color: #8b5cf6; }
.silo-card:nth-child(3) { --accent-color: #10b981; }
.silo-card:nth-child(4) { --accent-color: #f97316; }

.silo-header {
  padding: 40px;
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
}

.silo-type {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
}

.silo-icon {
  width: 48px;
  height: 48px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  margin-right: 16px;
  font-weight: 900;
  color: white;
  font-size: 20px;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.silo-icon::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2), transparent);
  border-radius: inherit;
}

.reverse-icon  { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #3b82f6, #1d4ed8); }
.priority-icon { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #8b5cf6, #7c3aed); }
.serial-icon   { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #10b981, #059669); }
.circle-icon   { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f97316, #ea580c); }

.silo-name {
  font-weight: 800;
  color: #1e293b;
  font-size: 1.3rem;
}

.one-click-badge {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #06b6d4, #0891b2);
  color: white;
  padding: 6px 16px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin-left: auto;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
}

.silo-description {
  color: #475569;
  font-size: 1rem;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

.silo-features {
  list-style: none;
}

.silo-features li {
  color: #64748b;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
  position: relative;
  padding-left: 20px;
}

.silo-features li::before {
  content: "→";
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  color: var(--accent-color);
  font-weight: bold;
}

.silo-visualization {
  padding: 40px;
  background: rgba(248, 250, 252, 0.8);
  flex: 1.2;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
  border-left: 1px solid rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.2);
}

.learn-more-btn {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 16px 24px;
  border: 2px solid rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.3);
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.1);
  color: #8b5cf6;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 1rem;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

.learn-more-btn::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  top: 0; left: -100%;
  width: 100%; height: 100%;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.1), transparent);
  transition: left 0.6s;
}

.learn-more-btn:hover {
  border-color: var(--accent-color);
  background: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.2);
  transform: translateY(-2px);
  color: #8b5cf6;
}

.learn-more-btn:hover::before {
  left: 100%;
}

.silo-controls {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 20px;
  margin-top: 40px;
}

.silo-nav-btn {
  background: transparent;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 50%;
  width: 50px;
  height: 50px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
  color: #8b5cf6;
  font-size: 20px;
}

.silo-nav-btn:disabled {
  opacity: 0.3;
  cursor: not-allowed;
  transform: none;
}

.silo-dots {
  display: flex;
  gap: 12px;
}

.silo-dot {
  width: 12px;
  height: 12px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.3);
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
  position: relative;
}

.silo-dot.active {
  background: #8b5cf6;
}

.silo-dot.active::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%; left: 50%;
  width: 20px; height: 20px;
  border: 2px solid rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.3);
  border-radius: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
}

.silo-video-wrapper {
  position: relative;
  display: block;
  border-radius: 20px;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-decoration: none;
}

.silo-video-wrapper img {
  transition: transform 0.4s ease, filter 0.4s ease;
}

.silo-video-wrapper:hover img {
  transform: scale(1.03);
  filter: brightness(0.85);
}

.silo-play-btn {
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%; left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  width: 68px; height: 68px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.45);
  backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
  border: 2px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
  z-index: 2;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.3);
  pointer-events: none;
}

.silo-play-btn svg {
  width: 28px; height: 28px;
  fill: white;
  margin-left: 3px;
  filter: drop-shadow(0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.2));
}

.silo-video-wrapper:hover .silo-play-btn {
  background: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.7);
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.1);
  box-shadow: 0 6px 30px rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.5);
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .silo-slider { overflow: visible; }
  .silo-track { display: block; width: 100%; }
  .silo-card { width: 100%; flex-direction: column; margin-bottom: 30px; min-height: auto; }
  .silo-visualization { border-left: none; border-top: 1px solid rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.2); }
  .silo-controls { display: none; }
  .silo-play-btn { width: 56px; height: 56px; }
  .silo-play-btn svg { width: 22px; height: 22px; }
}

/* ==========================================================================
   7. Final Conversion (CTA Section) Styling
   ========================================================================== */
.final-cta-section {
  padding: 6rem 0;
  background-color: #111827;
  color: white;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.bg-overlay {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.bg-gradient {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.2), rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.2));
  opacity: 0.3;
}

.bg-circle-1 {
  position: absolute;
  top: -10rem; right: -10rem; width: 20rem; height: 20rem;
  background: #6366f1; opacity: 0.1; border-radius: 50%; filter: blur(3rem);
}

.bg-circle-2 {
  position: absolute;
  bottom: -10rem; left: -10rem; width: 20rem; height: 20rem;
  background: #8b5cf6; opacity: 0.1; border-radius: 50%; filter: blur(3rem);
}

.bg-grid {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg width='60' height='60' viewBox='0 0 60 60' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cg fill='none' fill-rule='evenodd'%3E%3Cg fill='%23212121' fill-opacity='0.4'%3E%3Cpath d='M36 34h-2v-4h2v4zm0-6v-4h-2v4h2zM24 34h-2v-4h2v4zm0-6v-4h-2v4h2z'/%3E%3C/g%3E%3C/g%3E%3C/svg%3E");
  opacity: 0.05;
}

.main-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: 3rem;
  align-items: center;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 10;
}

@media (min-width: 1024px) {
  .main-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 7fr 5fr;
  }
}

.testimonial-card {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
  backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
  border-radius: 1rem;
  padding: 2.5rem;
  position: relative;
}

.testimonial-card::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 0.25rem;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #6366f1, #8b5cf6);
}

.testimonial-header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}

.testimonial-avatars {
  display: flex;
  margin-right: 1rem;
}

.avatar {
  width: 2.5rem;
  height: 2.5rem;
  border-radius: 50%;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border: 2px solid;
  margin-left: -0.5rem;
}

.avatar:first-child { margin-left: 0; }
.avatar-1 { background: rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.2); border-color: rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.3); }
.avatar-2 { background: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.2); border-color: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.3); }
.avatar-3 { background: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.2); border-color: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.3); }
.avatar svg { width: 1.25rem; height: 1.25rem; opacity: 0.8; }

.badge {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #6366f1, #8b5cf6);
  color: white;
  border-radius: 9999px;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
}

.testimonial-meta h3 {
  font-size: 1.125rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  margin-top: 0px !important;
  color: white;
}

.testimonial-quote {
  font-size: 1.25rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9);
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  position: relative;
}

@media (min-width: 768px) {
  .testimonial-quote { font-size: 1.5rem; }
}

.quote-icon {
  position: absolute;
  top: -1rem; left: -1rem; width: 2.5rem; height: 2.5rem;
  color: rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.2);
}

.testimonial-author {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
}

.author-avatar {
  width: 3rem; height: 3rem;
  border-radius: 50%;
  object-fit: cover;
  border: 2px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
  margin-right: 1rem;
}

.author-info h4 { font-weight: 500; color: white; margin-bottom: 0px !important; }
.author-info p { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6); font-size: 0.875rem; }

.rating { margin-left: auto; display: flex; }
.rating svg { width: 1.25rem; height: 1.25rem; color: #fbbf24; fill: currentColor; }

.cta-content h2 {
  color: #ffffff;
  font-size: 2rem;
  font-weight: bold;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  line-height: 1.2;
}

@media (min-width: 768px) {
  .cta-content h2 { font-size: 2.5rem; }
}

.cta-content p {
  font-size: 1.25rem;
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}

.benefits-list { margin-bottom: 2rem; }

.benefit-item {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

.benefit-icon {
  width: 1.5rem; height: 1.5rem;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.2);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  margin-right: 0.75rem;
}

.benefit-icon svg { width: 1rem; height: 1rem; color: #6366f1; }
.benefit-text { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); }

.cta-buttons {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 1rem;
}

.primary-button {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #6366f1, #8b5cf6);
  color: white;
  padding: 1rem 2rem;
  border-radius: 0.5rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  text-decoration: none;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
  border: none;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-size: 1.125rem;
  box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
}

.primary-button:hover {
  transform: scale(1.02);
  box-shadow: 0 20px 25px -5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
}

.primary-button svg { width: 1.25rem; height: 1.25rem; }

.guarantee {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
  font-size: 0.875rem;
}

.guarantee svg { width: 1rem; height: 1rem; margin-right: 0.5rem; }

@media (min-width: 768px) {
  .sticky-cta { bottom: 2rem; right: 2rem; }
}

.sticky-button:hover { transform: scale(1.05); }
.sticky-button svg { width: 1.25rem; height: 1.25rem; }

/* ==========================================================================
   8. Shared Animation Rules
   ========================================================================== */
.fade-in {
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translateY(20px);
  animation: fadeIn 0.4s ease-out forwards;
}

.fade-out {
  opacity: 1;
  transform: translateY(0);
  animation: fadeOut 0.4s ease-out forwards;
}

.hidden {
  display: none;
}

@keyframes fadeIn { to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }
@keyframes fadeOut { to { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-20px); } }

@keyframes fadeInUp { to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }

@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .final-cta-section { padding: 4rem 0; }
  .testimonial-card { padding: 1.5rem; }
  .cta-content h2 { font-size: 1.75rem; }
}

You have total control before the interlink goes live.<br>You can always maintain your desired anchor text distribution using the <a href="https://linkboss.io/smart-anchor-text-optimization/">anchor text analysis tool</a>.
            </p>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

</div></div>

</div></div>


<p class="has-text-align-center wp-block-paragraph"></p><p class="has-text-align-center" style="font-size: 0.8125rem; color: #94a3b8; margin-top: 2rem; max-width: 800px; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; line-height: 1.6;">
    Pipeline Mode automatically selects the best link placement method for each link. <strong style="color: #64748b;">Native</strong> interlinks existing sentences. <strong style="color: #64748b;">Rephrase</strong> edits minimally. <strong style="color: #64748b;">Context</strong> adds new sentences. The first method to meet its threshold is used intelligently. Users can choose to use any one or multiple methods.
</p><p></p>
</div></div>

<p class="has-text-align-center" style="max-width:900px;margin:0 auto 30px;font-size:17px;line-height:1.7;color:#555;">
  Internal links distribute
  <a href="https://developers.google.com/search/docs/fundamentals/seo-starter-guide" target="_blank" rel="noopener">PageRank</a>
  across your site, help Google discover and understand content hierarchy,
  and guide visitors to related pages. Sites with strong internal linking
  structures rank higher, get indexed faster, and retain visitors longer.
  Learn more about
  <a href="https://linkboss.io/blog/what-is-internal-linking/">how internal linking works</a>
  and explore proven
  <a href="https://linkboss.io/blog/internal-linking-strategies/">internal linking strategies</a>.
</p>

<style>
/* --- Variables & Core --- */
:root {
    --lb-p1: #6B4DE8;
    --lb-p2: #7F44B3;
    --lb-grn: #09b76a;
    --lb-grn-lt: #e6f9f0;
    --lb-grn-dk: #076b3e;
    --lb-bg: #f7f6fd;
    --lb-card: #ffffff;
    --lb-muted: #6b5f85;
    --lb-dark: #07050f;
    --lb-border: #e8e2f6;
    --global-palette3: #1A202C;
}

.pricing-wrap * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
.pricing-wrap { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; padding: 32px 16px 48px; max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; width: 100%; }
.pricing-wrap h2.sr-only { position: absolute; width: 1px; height: 1px; overflow: hidden; clip: rect(0,0,0,0); }

/* --- Tabs --- */
.pricing-wrap .tab-row { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 0; margin-bottom: 36px; background: var(--lb-card); border: 1.5px solid var(--lb-border); border-radius: 40px; padding: 5px; width: fit-content; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; }
.pricing-wrap .tab-btn { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; color: var(--lb-muted); background: transparent; border: none; padding: 9px 24px; border-radius: 30px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; letter-spacing: 0.01em; }
.pricing-wrap .tab-btn.active { background: var(--lb-p1); color: #fff; }
.pricing-wrap .tab-btn:not(.active):hover { color: var(--lb-p1); }

.pricing-wrap .panel { display: none; }
.pricing-wrap .panel.active { display: block; }

/* --- FREE PANEL --- */
.pricing-wrap .free-panel { margin-bottom: 28px; }
.pricing-wrap .free-card { background: var(--lb-card); border-radius: 20px; border: 2px solid var(--lb-grn); overflow: hidden; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 260px 1fr; }
.pricing-wrap .free-left { background: linear-gradient(160deg, #f0fdf7 0%, #e6f9f0 100%); padding: 36px 28px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center; border-right: 1.5px solid #b6f0d8; position: relative; }
.pricing-wrap .free-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; background: #fff; border: 1.5px solid var(--lb-grn); color: var(--lb-grn-dk); font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; padding: 4px 14px; border-radius: 20px; letter-spacing: 0.05em; margin-bottom: 20px; text-transform: uppercase; }
.pricing-wrap .free-label { font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-size: 16px; color: var(--lb-p1); letter-spacing: 1px; margin-bottom: 6px; }
.pricing-wrap .free-price { font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-size: 52px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--lb-grn); line-height: 1; margin-bottom: 4px; }
.pricing-wrap .free-period { font-size: 12px; color: var(--lb-muted); margin-bottom: 16px; }
.pricing-wrap .free-credits-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: #fff; border: 1.5px solid var(--lb-border); border-radius: 8px; padding: 6px 12px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--lb-dark); margin-bottom: auto; }
.pricing-wrap .free-spacer { flex: 1; min-height: 20px; }
.pricing-wrap .free-cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: var(--lb-grn); color: #fff; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 30px; border: none; cursor: pointer; width: 100%; justify-content: center; margin-top: 20px; text-decoration: none; }
.pricing-wrap .free-cta:hover { background: #07a35e; }
.pricing-wrap .free-note { font-size: 11px; color: var(--lb-muted); margin-top: 8px; text-align: center; }
.pricing-wrap .free-right { padding: 28px 32px; }
.pricing-wrap .features-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 20px 32px; }
.pricing-wrap .fc-label { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: var(--lb-muted); margin-bottom: 10px; padding-bottom: 6px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--lb-border); }

/* --- Global List Stylings (Inter 18px) --- */
.pricing-wrap .fc-list, .pricing-wrap .plan-features { list-style: none; padding-left: 0 !important; }

.pricing-wrap .fc-list li,
.pricing-wrap .plan-features li {
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-start;
    gap: 10px;
    font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
    font-size: 18px;
    line-height: 20px;
    font-weight: 400;
    color: var(--global-palette3, #1A202C);
}

.pricing-wrap .fc-list li { margin-bottom: 7px; }

.pricing-wrap .fc-list li svg,
.pricing-wrap .plan-features li svg {
    width: 18px;
    height: 18px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    margin-top: 1px;
}

.pricing-wrap .check-green { stroke: var(--lb-grn); }
.pricing-wrap .check-purple { stroke: var(--lb-p1); }

.pricing-wrap .trust-bar { display: flex; gap: 20px; margin-top: 20px; padding-top: 16px; border-top: 1px solid var(--lb-border); flex-wrap: wrap; }
.pricing-wrap .trust-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--lb-muted); }
.pricing-wrap .trust-item svg { width: 14px; height: 14px; stroke: var(--lb-grn); }

/* --- PAID CARDS --- */
.pricing-wrap .cards-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 18px; }

.pricing-wrap .plan-card {
    background: #f4f4f6;
    border-radius: 16px;
    border: none;
    padding: 40px 20px;
    position: relative;
    transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    text-align: center;
}
.pricing-wrap .plan-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(107, 77, 232, 0.1); }
.pricing-wrap .plan-card.featured { background: var(--lb-p1); color: #fff; }

.pricing-wrap .popular-badge {
    position: absolute;
    top: -16px;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    background: #fff;
    color: var(--lb-p1);
    border: 1.5px solid var(--lb-p1);
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 700;
    padding: 6px 20px;
    border-radius: 30px;
    white-space: nowrap;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
}

.pricing-wrap .plan-label { font-family: 'Shadows Into Light Two'; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 2; color: #9275eb; margin-bottom: 12px; }
.pricing-wrap .plan-card.featured .plan-label { color: #d8ccfa; }

.pricing-wrap .plan-price-wrap { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 4px; min-height: 60px; justify-content: flex-end; }
.pricing-wrap .plan-price { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 42px; font-weight: 800; color: #111; line-height: 1; }
.pricing-wrap .plan-card.featured .plan-price { color: #fff; }
.pricing-wrap .strike { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; text-decoration: line-through; color: #222; margin-bottom: 4px; }
.pricing-wrap .plan-card.featured .strike { color: #e0d4fa; }

.pricing-wrap .plan-credits { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: #111; margin-bottom: 28px; }
.pricing-wrap .plan-card.featured .plan-credits { color: #fff; }

.pricing-wrap .plan-features { flex: 1; width: 85%; margin: 0 auto; text-align: left; }
.pricing-wrap .plan-features li { padding: 12px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08); }
.pricing-wrap .plan-features li:first-child { border-top: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08); }
.pricing-wrap .plan-features li svg { stroke: #111; }

.pricing-wrap .plan-card.featured .plan-features li { color: #fff; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2); }
.pricing-wrap .plan-card.featured .plan-features li:first-child { border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2); }
.pricing-wrap .plan-card.featured .plan-features li svg { stroke: #fff; }

/* --- Buttons & CTAs --- */
.pricing-wrap .shared-cta-wrap { display: flex; justify-content: center; margin-top: 36px; }
.pricing-wrap .shared-cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; background: var(--lb-dark); color: #fff; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; padding: 16px 36px; border-radius: 40px; border: none; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.2s; letter-spacing: 0.01em; }
.pricing-wrap .shared-cta:hover { background: #1a1625; }
.pricing-wrap .shared-cta svg { width: 18px; height: 18px; flex-shrink: 0; }

.pricing-wrap .plan-card .shared-cta { margin-top: 28px; padding: 12px 20px; font-size: 14px; width: 100%; justify-content: center; }

/* --- Responsive --- */
@media(max-width:900px) {
    .pricing-wrap .cards-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
    .pricing-wrap .free-card { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
    .pricing-wrap .free-left { border-right: none; border-bottom: 1.5px solid #b6f0d8; }
    .pricing-wrap .features-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
}
@media(max-width:560px) {
    .pricing-wrap .cards-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr !important; }
    .pricing-wrap .tab-btn { padding: 9px 16px; font-size: 13px; }
    .pricing-wrap .shared-cta { font-size: 14px; padding: 14px 28px; }
}
</style>

<script>
function switchTab(name){
  document.querySelectorAll('.pricing-wrap .tab-btn').forEach(function(b){b.classList.remove('active');});
  document.querySelectorAll('.pricing-wrap .panel').forEach(function(p){p.classList.remove('active');});
  document.getElementById('tab-'+name).classList.add('active');
  document.querySelectorAll('.pricing-wrap .tab-btn').forEach(function(b){
    if(b.getAttribute('onclick').indexOf("'"+name+"'")!==-1)b.classList.add('active');
  });
}
</script>

<li>Almost all Gutenberg-based blocks (e.g., Spectra, Generateblocks, KadenceBlock, CoBlocks, Otter Blocks, EssentialBlocks, Ultimate Blocks etc)</li>



<li>Elementor, Beaver</li>



<li>Divi, Bricks, Oxygen, Thrive Architect</li>



<li>Custom Post Types, ACF Fields</li>
</ul>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph">We are working hard to add more pagebuilder support ASAP.</p>
</div></div></div>



<div class="wp-block-kadence-pane kt-accordion-pane kt-accordion-pane-8 kt-pane6142_3d8561-b4"><div class="kt-accordion-header-wrap"><button class="kt-blocks-accordion-header kt-acccordion-button-label-show" type="button" id="kt-accordion-header-82887" aria-controls="kt-accordion-panel-82887" data-kt-accordion-header-id="9" aria-expanded="false"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title-wrap"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title">Do you offer a free trial?</span></span><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-icon-trigger"></span></button></div><div class="kt-accordion-panel kt-accordion-panel-hidden" id="kt-accordion-panel-82887" aria-labelledby="kt-accordion-header-82887" role="region" data-panel-height="0px"><div class="kt-accordion-panel-inner">
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">We offer a FREE 7 days trial. The free plan includes:</p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Access to all LinkBoss tools</li>



<li>Ability to try on one website</li>
</ul>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Just <a href="https://app.linkboss.io/register" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener nofollow">sign up for free</a> and start using the tool. No CC required.</p>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph"><br></p>
</div></div></div>



<div class="wp-block-kadence-pane kt-accordion-pane kt-accordion-pane-9 kt-pane6142_69c827-8f"><div class="kt-accordion-header-wrap"><button class="kt-blocks-accordion-header kt-acccordion-button-label-show" type="button" id="kt-accordion-header-858690" aria-controls="kt-accordion-panel-858690" data-kt-accordion-header-id="10" aria-expanded="false"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title-wrap"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title">What languages do you support?</span></span><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-icon-trigger"></span></button></div><div class="kt-accordion-panel kt-accordion-panel-hidden" id="kt-accordion-panel-858690" aria-labelledby="kt-accordion-header-858690" role="region" data-panel-height="0px"><div class="kt-accordion-panel-inner">
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Currently, we support English, Spanish, German, Dutch, French, Portuguese, Indonesian, Romanian, Italian, Danish, Finnish, Swedish, Tagalog, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Malay, Polish, Russian, Bulgarian, Turkish, Czech, Hungarian, Serbian, Slovak, Arabic, Norwegian, Greek, Vietnamese, Albanian and Ukrainian. More language support is coming soon.</p>
</div></div></div>



<div class="wp-block-kadence-pane kt-accordion-pane kt-accordion-pane-12 kt-pane6142_7c5eb8-9a"><div class="kt-accordion-header-wrap"><button class="kt-blocks-accordion-header kt-acccordion-button-label-show" type="button" id="kt-accordion-header-516929" aria-controls="kt-accordion-panel-516929" data-kt-accordion-header-id="11" aria-expanded="false"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title-wrap"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title">Why should I choose a web-based tool over plugins?</span></span><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-icon-trigger"></span></button></div><div class="kt-accordion-panel kt-accordion-panel-hidden" id="kt-accordion-panel-516929" aria-labelledby="kt-accordion-header-516929" role="region" data-panel-height="0px"><div class="kt-accordion-panel-inner">
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Plugins were built for a simpler era of SEO. LinkBoss is built for scale. Here’s why teams choose our web-based platform instead:</p>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph"><strong>True AI Performance, No Compromises</strong>: Plugins store data directly in your WordPress database and run every calculation on your own server. If you are on shared hosting or a server with limited resources, that means slow processing, timeouts, and a bloated database eating into your site’s speed. LinkBoss runs entirely in the cloud on GPU-optimized infrastructure, so the heavy lifting never touches your server and your site stays fast.</p>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph"><strong>Manage Every Site From One Place</strong>: Whether you run 3 sites or 300, you get a single dashboard for all of them. No juggling separate licenses, no logging in and out. One workspace, everything under control.</p>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph"><strong>Built to Actually Use</strong>: A clunky UI means wasted hours. LinkBoss is fast, clean, and designed around your workflow, so you spend less time navigating and more time building links that rank.</p>
</div></div></div>



<div class="wp-block-kadence-pane kt-accordion-pane kt-accordion-pane-11 kt-pane6142_54b322-60"><div class="kt-accordion-header-wrap"><button class="kt-blocks-accordion-header kt-acccordion-button-label-show" type="button" id="kt-accordion-header-240773" aria-controls="kt-accordion-panel-240773" data-kt-accordion-header-id="12" aria-expanded="false"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title-wrap"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title">Do you offer moneyback guarantee?</span></span><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-icon-trigger"></span></button></div><div class="kt-accordion-panel kt-accordion-panel-hidden" id="kt-accordion-panel-240773" aria-labelledby="kt-accordion-header-240773" role="region" data-panel-height="0px"><div class="kt-accordion-panel-inner">
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">We offer 14 days moneyback guarantee. No questions asked.</p>
</div></div></div>



<div class="wp-block-kadence-pane kt-accordion-pane kt-accordion-pane-14 kt-pane6142_3b67a3-d8"><div class="kt-accordion-header-wrap"><button class="kt-blocks-accordion-header kt-acccordion-button-label-show" type="button" id="kt-accordion-header-908483" aria-controls="kt-accordion-panel-908483" data-kt-accordion-header-id="13" aria-expanded="false"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title-wrap"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title">Can I remove a site and add a new one?</span></span><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-icon-trigger"></span></button></div><div class="kt-accordion-panel kt-accordion-panel-hidden" id="kt-accordion-panel-908483" aria-labelledby="kt-accordion-header-908483" role="region" data-panel-height="0px"><div class="kt-accordion-panel-inner">
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Yes. <br><br>The limit is:<br>If your plan has 3-site limit, you can get max 3 site replacements per month. If you have 50 site limit, you can get 50 sites replaced per month.</p>
</div></div></div>



<div class="wp-block-kadence-pane kt-accordion-pane kt-accordion-pane-13 kt-pane6142_57067a-27"><div class="kt-accordion-header-wrap"><button class="kt-blocks-accordion-header kt-acccordion-button-label-show" type="button" id="kt-accordion-header-864539" aria-controls="kt-accordion-panel-864539" data-kt-accordion-header-id="14" aria-expanded="false"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title-wrap"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title">Do the credits expire?</span></span><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-icon-trigger"></span></button></div><div class="kt-accordion-panel kt-accordion-panel-hidden" id="kt-accordion-panel-864539" aria-labelledby="kt-accordion-header-864539" role="region" data-panel-height="0px"><div class="kt-accordion-panel-inner">
<p class="wp-block-paragraph"><strong>Monthly Plans:</strong> Credit resets at the end of each month. Unused credits do not roll over. This policy helps us keep pricing affordable for everyone.</p>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph"><strong>Yearly Plans:</strong> You receive all your credits right after purchasing, valid for 1 year from the purchase date. Any unused credits will expire after 1 year.</p>
</div></div></div>



<div class="wp-block-kadence-pane kt-accordion-pane kt-accordion-pane-20 kt-pane6142_554651-07"><div class="kt-accordion-header-wrap"><button class="kt-blocks-accordion-header kt-acccordion-button-label-show" type="button" id="kt-accordion-header-660979" aria-controls="kt-accordion-panel-660979" data-kt-accordion-header-id="15" aria-expanded="false"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title-wrap"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title"><strong>Can I test LinkBoss on a staging or development site?</strong></span></span><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-icon-trigger"></span></button></div><div class="kt-accordion-panel kt-accordion-panel-hidden" id="kt-accordion-panel-660979" aria-labelledby="kt-accordion-header-660979" role="region" data-panel-height="0px"><div class="kt-accordion-panel-inner">
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Absolutely. We encourage you to test LinkBoss on your staging or development site before going live. If you run out of credits during testing, just reach out to us via live chat and we’ll top you up with additional test credits so you can explore everything without limitations.</p>
</div></div></div>



<div class="wp-block-kadence-pane kt-accordion-pane kt-accordion-pane-21 kt-pane6142_ef6b49-a4"><div class="kt-accordion-header-wrap"><button class="kt-blocks-accordion-header kt-acccordion-button-label-show" type="button" id="kt-accordion-header-840313" aria-controls="kt-accordion-panel-840313" data-kt-accordion-header-id="16" aria-expanded="false"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title-wrap"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title"><strong><strong>Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan anytime?</strong></strong></span></span><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-icon-trigger"></span></button></div><div class="kt-accordion-panel kt-accordion-panel-hidden" id="kt-accordion-panel-840313" aria-labelledby="kt-accordion-header-840313" role="region" data-panel-height="0px"><div class="kt-accordion-panel-inner">
<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Yes, and LinkBoss gives you more flexibility than a typical upgrade/downgrade system. You can stack multiple subscriptions at once, meaning if you need more credits, simply add another plan alongside your current one. You can also cancel any individual subscription at any time. No waiting for a billing cycle to end, no rigid plan locks.</p>
</div></div></div>
</div></div></div>
</div></div>
</div></div>

</div></div>

let activeBenefit = 0;
let isHovered = false;
let isInView = false;
let intervalId = null;

function createTabButtons() {
    const tabsContainer = document.querySelector('.benefits-tabs');
    
    benefits.forEach((benefit, index) => {
        const button = document.createElement('button');
        button.className = `tab-button ${index === 0 ? 'active' : ''}`;
        button.innerHTML = `
            <div class="tab-content">
                <span class="tab-title">${benefit.title}</span>
                <svg class="chevron" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                    <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M9 5l7 7-7 7"/>
                </svg>
            </div>
            <div class="progress-bar"></div>
        `;
        
        button.addEventListener('click', () => handleTabClick(index));
        button.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
            isHovered = true;
            setActiveBenefit(index);
        });
        
        tabsContainer.appendChild(button);
    });
}

function handleTabClick(index) {
    setActiveBenefit(index);
}

function setActiveBenefit(index) {
    if (activeBenefit === index) return;
    
    activeBenefit = index;
    updateActiveTab();
    updateContent();
}

function updateActiveTab() {
    const buttons = document.querySelectorAll('.tab-button');
    buttons.forEach((button, index) => {
        if (index === activeBenefit) {
            button.classList.add('active');
        } else {
            button.classList.remove('active');
        }
    });
}

function updateContent() {
    const benefit = benefits[activeBenefit];
    const titleEl = document.getElementById('active-title');
    const descriptionEl = document.getElementById('active-description');
    const imageEl = document.getElementById('active-image');
    const iconEl = document.querySelector('.icon-container svg');
    
    const cardContent = document.querySelector('.content-card');
    cardContent.classList.add('fade-out');
    
    setTimeout(() => {
        titleEl.textContent = benefit.title;
        descriptionEl.innerHTML = benefit.description; // Fixed: was textContent
        imageEl.src = benefit.image;
        imageEl.alt = benefit.title;
        iconEl.innerHTML = benefit.icon;
        
        cardContent.classList.remove('fade-out');
        cardContent.classList.add('fade-in');
        
        setTimeout(() => {
            cardContent.classList.remove('fade-in');
        }, 400);
    }, 200);
}

function startAutoRotation() {
    if (isInView && !isHovered) {
        intervalId = setInterval(() => {
            const nextIndex = (activeBenefit + 1) % benefits.length;
            setActiveBenefit(nextIndex);
        }, 3000);
    }
}

function stopAutoRotation() {
    if (intervalId) {
        clearInterval(intervalId);
        intervalId = null;
    }
}

function handleIntersection(entries) {
    entries.forEach(entry => {
        isInView = entry.isIntersecting;
        if (isInView) {
            startAutoRotation();
        } else {
            stopAutoRotation();
        }
    });
}

// Initialize
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
    createTabButtons();
    
    const section = document.getElementById('benefits');
    const observer = new IntersectionObserver(handleIntersection, {
        threshold: 0.3
    });
    observer.observe(section);
    
    section.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
        isHovered = true;
        stopAutoRotation();
    });
    
    section.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
        isHovered = false;
        if (isInView) {
            startAutoRotation();
        }
    });
});

// Slider functionality
let currentSlide = 0;
const totalSlides = 4;
const track = document.getElementById('siloTrack');
const prevBtn = document.getElementById('prevBtn');
const nextBtn = document.getElementById('nextBtn');
const dots = document.querySelectorAll('.silo-dot');

function updateSlider() {
    const translateX = -currentSlide * 25;
    track.style.transform = `translateX(${translateX}%)`;

    // Update dots
    dots.forEach((dot, index) => {
        dot.classList.toggle('active', index === currentSlide);
    });

    // Update button states
    prevBtn.disabled = currentSlide === 0;
    nextBtn.disabled = currentSlide === totalSlides - 1;
}

function nextSlide() {
    if (currentSlide < totalSlides - 1) {
        currentSlide++;
        updateSlider();
    }
}

function prevSlide() {
    if (currentSlide > 0) {
        currentSlide--;
        updateSlider();
    }
}

function goToSlide(slideIndex) {
    currentSlide = slideIndex;
    updateSlider();
}

// Event listeners
nextBtn.addEventListener('click', nextSlide);
prevBtn.addEventListener('click', prevSlide);

dots.forEach((dot, index) => {
    dot.addEventListener('click', () => goToSlide(index));
});


// Initialize
updateSlider();

// Add click interactions
document.querySelectorAll('.learn-more-btn').forEach(button => {
    button.addEventListener('click', function() {
        // Add a subtle click animation
        this.style.transform = 'scale(0.98) translateY(-2px)';
        setTimeout(() => {
            this.style.transform = '';
        }, 150);
    });
});
</script><link rel="preload" href="https://linkboss.io/wp-content/fonts/inter/UcCO3FwrK3iLTeHuS_nVMrMxCp50SjIw2boKoduKmMEVuGKYAZ9hiA.woff2" as="font" type="font/woff2" crossorigin=""><link rel="stylesheet" id="kadence-fonts-footer_gfonts-css" href="https://linkboss.io/wp-content/fonts/b77855a4d0c34b7d7e3c39abf49c78e2.css?ver=1.5.0" media="all">

                            if (typeof window.jQuery != "undefined") {
                                if (jQuery.fn.fitVids) {
                                    jQuery(element).parent().fitVids();
                                }

                        }
                    }
                }};

            var lazyLoadInstance = e.detail.instance;

            if (window.MutationObserver) {

                            image_count += images.length;
			                iframe_count += iframes.length;

                            if(is_image){
                                image_count += 1;
